title: The One Animal a Great White Shark Runs From
script: There's one animal that makes a great white shark flee in pure terror, and it's not what you'd guess. When it shows up, great whites don't fight; they abandon their entire hunting grounds for months. That animal is the orca. Orcas hunt in coordinated packs, and they've figured out how to flip a shark upside down, which locks it into a frozen, helpless trance, then they eat only its liver and leave the rest. Off California, tagged great whites fled the instant orcas arrived. The ocean's most feared predator has a predator of its own. So what does that make the orca?
